query: SELECT f.id, f.nome, f.cargo, f.condominioId, c.nome as condominioNome FROM funcionarios f LEFT JOIN condominios c ON f.condominioId = c.id LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4BJigjDSHDXY3fo.aa7eee47dc1b --database eMtgZyuGJNKHLXS6iHiZyG --execute SELECT f.id, f.nome, f.cargo, f.condominioId, c.nome as condominioNome FROM funcionarios f LEFT JOIN condominios c ON f.condominioId = c.id LIMIT 10;
